prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and Mika Emberlane in a cropped travel jacket standing at a wooden quest board. Renji unfolds a large, weathered quest map across the table. Mika leans in, pointing to a specific region on the map with a focused, observant expression. High-detail anime aesthetic, cinematic lighting, warm guild atmosphere, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika slides a brass Scout's Compass onto the map to mark a route, while Renji nods in agreement, placing his hand on the hilt of his Dawnblade broadsword. They share a brief, determined look of coordination before looking back at the map. Consistent lighting, camera, and character designs, no text, no watermark.
